description: Wider cargo test --lib compiler2:: sweep panics in World::validate_module_interface_expectations during compiler2_materializes_closed_union_protocol_dispatch_as_local_dispatch. Validation currently calls module_name(id).expect("validated modules should have reverse names"), but some protocol/impl-owned module ids reach validation without a reverse name. Fix the data/model boundary so expectation validation only requires a printable module name when it must emit a diagnostic, and keep unnamed modules from crashing the sweep.
title: Compiler2 interface validation: stop assuming every validated module has a reverse name
